value: The toppled eggs smash all over them.\nSorry to the chicken who laid them...
What brilliant team cooperation!\nThe eggs come out of that unscathed.
Wow! A chick—no, several chicks!\nTo be returned back to their parents...
$aFoes grant 5x SP for the next $a0,\nand then 2x SP thereafter! (Only highest\nvalue applied. Does not stack.)
